Title: Pilates Session 2 • 30m
WorkoutDescription: Pilates • 30m Today’s class focuses on lower body strength and control. We’ll move through grounded flows that fire up your glutes, legs, and hips, while keeping the core engaged and stable. Every movement connects to breath and control. A great one for cross-training and improving lower-body alignment. You'll need a mat, or a soft surface.

Title: Stretch & Stability Session 2 • 25m
WorkoutDescription: Stretch • 25m Get ready to fire up your core, mobilize your spine, and unlock your hips. A smooth flow to build postural strength and ease tight spots. Perfect as a reset after a long day, or a light flush post-run. You'll leave this one standing taller and breathing deeper. No wall or equipment needed.

Title: Mile Up & Overs • 7.1km
WorkoutDescription: Intervals • 7.1km • 45m - 50m 1.5km warm up at a conversational pace (no faster than 5:45/km), 90s walking rest Repeat the following 3x: ---------- 400m at 5:55/km 400m at 4:45/km 400m at 5:55/km 400m at 4:45/km 120s walking rest ---------- 800m cool down at a conversational pace (or slower!)

Title: Pilates Session 3 • 30m
WorkoutDescription: Pilates • 30m This session is all about pelvic stability—a game-changer for runners and anyone dealing with hip or lower back tension. We’ll explore neutral pelvis alignment, breath-led core work, and small but powerful movements to stabilize your "powerhouse" center. Expect to move slow, stay focused, and build from the inside out. Remember to grab a mat or something soft to move on.

Title: Stretch & Stability Session 3 • 25m
WorkoutDescription: Stretch • 25m This flow is designed to mobilize your spine, unlock your hips, and strengthen your lower legs. Gentle but focused movements to prep your body for the miles of running ahead. It’s a good one to revisit on rest days too. Give your joints some space to move freely again. No wall or equipment needed.
